basicInfo.name: Nightmare Jumon
basicInfo.flavor: When Waki fell to Ace, Jumon vanished from Moonlit Isle, vowing to one day take her vengeance.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 90% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Curse Release
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 80% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Effect Hit Rate Reduction. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - 100% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 60% chance to inflict Souldeath. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 80% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Curse Totem
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 80% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - 60% chance to inflict Souldeath. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 80% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Magic Protection
Passive.desc:
All Allies
 - Grants Magic Damage Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - Grants Magic Damage Immunity upon using a basic attack 1 time(s). [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

profile.story:
After the war on Moonlit Isle left her an orphan, Jumon was approached by Waki, a nobleman more distinguished than any she'd seen before.
Having spent days starving in her ruined village, Jumon felt in her gut that this man was her only hope for survival.
As a spellweaver, Jumon instinctively attempted to use mind control on him.
Unluckily for Jumon, Waki was far more skilled in spellweaving and quickly overpowered her.
Jumon thought it was the end for her, but Waki took her in.
Of course, it wasn't compassion that drove him — he was intrigued by her raw nerve and untapped potential.
With Waki as her mentor, Jumon honed her spellweaving skills and soon rose to become his trusted right hand.
